---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  type: grid
  fields: [image, date, title, description, reading-time]
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: [title, date]
  categories: true
  feed: true
---

A dedicated space for me to write about the things that have been on my mind. 

![](subscribe.html){width=800 height=300}
